name: Workshop Development
description: Generates structured outlines and session plans for professional development workshops.

inputs.name: workshopTitle
inputs.description: Title or working name for the workshop.

inputs.name: duration
inputs.description: Total workshop length (e.g., 2 hours, full day).

inputs.name: objectives
inputs.description: Learning objectives or outcomes for participants.

inputs.name: constraints
inputs.description: Any logistical constraints, client requests, or scope notes.

outputs.name: workshopOutline
outputs.description: Structured workshop outline with session flow, activities, and timing.
